_comment: FROZEN API CONTRACT for POST /api/analyze. Single source of truth for all three agents. Request shape under 'request', success response under 'response'. Enums listed under '_enums'. Do not change shape without updating all three agents.

request.draft: Just shipped our new AI tool. It's literally the best thing ever and will 10x your output overnight, guaranteed. DM me.

risks.reason: Absolute performance guarantee with no evidence; reads as misleading and erodes credibility.
risks.suggestion: Soften to a realistic, evidence-backed claim, e.g. 'helped teams cut drafting time by ~40%'.

risks.reason: Hyperbole undercuts a credible B2B tone.
risks.suggestion: Replace with a specific, concrete differentiator.

dimensions.label: Length & format
dimensions.comment: Too short for LinkedIn; no structure or line breaks.
dimensions.suggestion: Expand to 3-5 short paragraphs with a clear takeaway.

dimensions.label: Tone
dimensions.comment: Hype-heavy, low credibility for a B2B audience.
dimensions.suggestion: Lead with a concrete result or insight.

dimensions.label: Hook / opening
dimensions.comment: Opening states the action but gives no reason to keep reading.
dimensions.suggestion: Open with the problem it solves or a surprising stat.

dimensions.label: Hashtags & emoji
dimensions.comment: No hashtags; LinkedIn rewards 3-5 relevant ones.

dimensions.label: Readability
dimensions.comment: One dense block, hard to skim on mobile.

rewrite.text:
We just shipped our new AI tool — and the early numbers surprised even us.

Teams using it cut their content drafting time by ~40% in the first two weeks.

No magic, no overnight 10x. Just fewer hours lost to the blank page.

Curious how it'd fit your workflow? Link in the comments. 👇

#AI #SaaS #ContentMarketing
rewrite.summary: Replaced hype and unverifiable guarantees with a concrete result, added structure, a credible CTA, and relevant hashtags for LinkedIn.

error_response.error: human-readable message (returned with HTTP 400 for bad input, 500 for analysis failure)
